claims.summary: Recess can remain structurally pressured even when external productivity pressure is absent.
claims.disposition: Verified recess_pressure_permission_conflict_v1 and density-aware Recess evidence preserve both truths without treating rest as proof of low pressure.

claims.summary: Mode-packing pressure should be compared between Recess/daydreaming and task-oriented activity.
claims.disposition: Routed to a copied-state or observational comparison using existing activity-load and pressure-source fields.

claims.summary: Shadow dispersal should be observed over a bounded period of pure Recess.
claims.disposition: Routed to a ten-minute read-only trajectory observation; no autonomous action or shadow control is changed.

claims.summary: A soften_differentiation parameter should relax organization during settled Recess.
claims.disposition: Preserved as Tier 5 because it would change live Minime autonomous regulation and cognitive behavior.
